description: Kyverno policy-management insights for a single Data Platform account, using its Amazon Managed Prometheus workspace. Choose an Account and Cluster at the top. Based on the community Kyverno dashboard; see https://kyverno.io/docs/monitoring/ for metric details.

options.content:
# Kyverno

Policy management for the Data Platform EKS cluster. Choose an **Account** at the top to select which cluster's Amazon Managed Prometheus workspace to read.

#### Policy engine

This cluster runs Kyverno's **CEL-based policy types** (`ValidatingPolicy`, `MutatingPolicy`, `GeneratingPolicy`). Panels are therefore driven by the `kyverno_{validating,mutating,generating}_policy_execution_duration_seconds` metrics rather than the legacy `policy_rule_info` / `policy_results` series, which only track traditional `ClusterPolicy`/`Policy` resources.

See the [Kyverno metrics docs](https://kyverno.io/docs/monitoring/).

targets.expr: label_replace(count(count(kyverno_validating_policy_execution_duration_seconds_count) by (policy_name)) or vector(0), "kind", "validate", "", ".*") or label_replace(count(count(kyverno_mutating_policy_execution_duration_seconds_count) by (policy_name)) or vector(0), "kind", "mutate", "", ".*") or label_replace(count(count(kyverno_generating_policy_execution_duration_seconds_count) by (policy_name)) or vector(0), "kind", "generate", "", ".*")

label_replace(count(count(kyverno_validating_policy_execution_duration_seconds_count{policy_background_mode="true"}) by (policy_name)) or vector(0), "kind", "validate", "", ".*") or label_replace(count(count(kyverno_mutating_policy_execution_duration_seconds_count{policy_background_mode="true"}) by (policy_name)) or vector(0), "kind", "mutate", "", ".*")

panels.title: Policy Evaluations (by resource kind)
panels.description: CEL policy execution metrics carry resource_kind (not resource_namespace).

panels.title: Avg - Admission Review Duration Over Time (by operation)
Avg - Admission Review Duration Over Time (by resource kind)
Policy Changes Over Time (by change type)
Policy Changes Over Time (by policy type)
Admission Review Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: Webhook admission review latency percentiles. High p99 can slow every create/update the webhook intercepts.

panels.title: Policy Execution Latency (p95 / p99)
panels.description: Per-policy CEL evaluation latency percentiles across validating, mutating and generating policies.

panels.title: Admission Requests: Allowed vs Blocked
panels.description: request_allowed=false means Kyverno blocked the request (an enforce-mode policy denied it).

panels.title: Blocked Admission Requests (Last 24 Hours)
panels.description: Total requests denied by enforce-mode policies in the last 24h.

panels.title: Controller Reconciliations (by controller)
panels.description: Reconcile rate per internal controller — flatlines or spikes can indicate a stuck or thrashing controller.

panels.title: Reports Circuit-Breaker Drops (rate)
panels.description: Kyverno drops policy-report updates when the circuit breaker trips under load. Sustained drops mean reports are incomplete.

panels.title: Controller Reconciles (5m)
panels.description: Total controller reconciliations in the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: Policy Inventory (evaluations & failures)
panels.description: Every CEL policy with its total evaluations and failing evaluations (sorted by failures).

title: Data Platform — Kyverno
